description: Observability dashboard for the LLM rerank pipeline (ticket #240). Covers cost/token usage, call count, cache hit rate, latency, and fallback count. All metrics are in the QuadzeroScout/LlmRerank CloudWatch namespace.

metrics.description: Number of LLM rerank calls initiated by the worker. Emitted once per successful worker invocation (after kill-switch and candidate checks pass).
Input token count per LLM rerank call. Use Sum over a period for total token consumption.
Output token count per LLM rerank call.
Wall-clock duration of the rerankTopN LLM call in milliseconds. Use p50/p95 statistics to track added latency of the async rerank step.
Number of times the LLM rerank worker caught an error and fell back to deterministic order. A sustained non-zero value indicates LLM instability.
Read-path cache hits: a fresh, hash-matching LLM rerank result was found and applied to the page.
Read-path cache misses: no stored result or a stale/hash-mismatched entry triggered an async worker recompute.
Emitted when the worker is invoked but LLM_RERANK_ENABLED=false. A non-zero count confirms the kill switch is active.

derivedQueries.name: CacheHitRate
derivedQueries.description: Percentage of read-path requests served from a fresh cached rerank. Target >80% in steady state.
